user_message: My Snowflake connection keeps timing out.

results.title: Troubleshooting connection timeouts
results.snippet: Connection timeouts usually indicate a firewall or VPC rule blocking outbound traffic. Check security group rules and ensure the source IP is allowlisted.

results.title: Snowflake connector setup
results.snippet: To connect Snowflake: provide account identifier, warehouse, database, schema, username, and password or private key. Use IAM role for production environments.

results.title: First-time onboarding checklist
results.snippet: Step 1: create a service account with read-only access. Step 2: generate credentials. Step 3: run a connection test. Step 4: confirm schema detection.

output: {"mode": "troubleshooting", "answer": "Connection timeouts usually indicate a firewall or VPC rule blocking outbound traffic to Snowflake. Check your security group rules and ensure the source IP is allowlisted. Verify that your warehouse is active and that the account identifier, username, and password (or private key) are correct. Run a connection test to confirm the issue persists.", "confidence": "high", "sources": ["note-002", "note-001"], "needs_more_info": false}
